---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Environment
- **Editor:** (Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / Gemini CLI / other)
- **Mode:** (beginner / expert / mcp)
- **OS:** (macOS / Linux / Windows)
- **Node version:** (run `node -v`)
- **Package version:** (run `npx continuous-improvement --help`)

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `npx continuous-improvement install`
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages or logs.

## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or log files.
